name: @bububuger/spanory
description: Spanory CLI for cross-runtime agent observability

scripts.build:deps: npm run --workspace @bububuger/core build && npm run --workspace @bububuger/otlp-core build && npm run --workspace @bububuger/backend-langfuse build
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.runtime.json && npx esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --external:node:* --external:commander --outfile=dist/index.bundle.js && node -e "require('node:fs').renameSync('dist/index.bundle.js','dist/index.js')" && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run test/unit
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && vitest run test/unit --coverage
scripts.test:bdd: npm run build && vitest run test/bdd
scripts.build:bundle: npm run --workspace @bububuger/backend-langfuse build && npm run --workspace @bububuger/otlp-core build && npm run build && mkdir -p build && esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node18 --define:process.env.SPANORY_VERSION=\"$npm_package_version\" --outfile=build/spanory.cjs
scripts.build:bin:macos-arm64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/spanory.cjs --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output ../../dist/spanory-macos-arm64
scripts.build:bin:macos-x64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/spanory.cjs --targets node18-macos-x64 --output ../../dist/spanory-macos-x64
scripts.build:bin:linux-x64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/spanory.cjs --targets node18-linux-x64 --output ../../dist/spanory-linux-x64
scripts.build:bin:win-x64: npm run build:bundle && pkg build/spanory.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../../dist/spanory-win-x64.exe
